title: exceljs need higher performance, thank you
author: zlzdp
body:
I did some performance test, just compare exceljs with https://github.com/SheetJS/js-xlsx/ and xlsx-populate js lib.
js lib and version:
xlsx.js@0.14.3
exceljs@1.11.0
xlsx-populate@1.19.1
I tested it on web browser.

exceljs vs xlsx.js vs xlsx-populate
parse .xlsx file:
1MB file parse:
  882.985107421875ms
2481.923583984375ms
1339.385009765625ms

15MB file parse:
13153.964111328125ms
exceljs crashed
22480.077880859375ms

exceljs is so slowly.
any plan with better performance?
thank you.

comments.author: zlzdp
comments.body: https://github.com/SheetJS/js-xlsx/  have better performance, but it is not full features excel lib.

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: hey @zlzdp we've just merged some performance improvements, some benchmarks show a 4x speedup. could you share how you tested your benchmark and run it again against our `master`?
